description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI of mc_rtc with Docker that checks the build-and-install script on base Docker images. The workflow should trigger on push to all branches except when specific files are changed and on pull requests to any branch. It should use a matrix strategy to run on both debian_bullseye and ubuntu_22.04, checking out the repository and a superbuild submodule, freeing up space, building within Docker, and sending a Slack notification on failure.
